label: Groq
description: Connect to Groq's ultra-low-latency inference API to run open-source LLMs at speed.

form.title: Connect Groq
form.subtitle: Paste your Groq API key to start running ultra-fast inference.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Groq API key (starts with gsk_) from console.groq.com. Takes 30 seconds and requires no OAuth setup.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Groq API Key

1. Open [console.groq.com](https://console.groq.com) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. In the left sidebar, click **API Keys**.
3. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Submit**.
4. Copy the key — it starts with `gsk_` and is shown only once. Store it somewhere safe.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- If you lose the key, generate a new one from the same panel — old keys can be revoked there too.
- Free tier keys have rate limits per minute and per day; check your plan on the console dashboard.
- Optionally pin a specific default model below, or leave it blank to set the model per-request.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Groq API key from console.groq.com → API Keys. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: default_model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Model to use when no model is specified in a request. Leave blank to set per-request.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you're using a custom proxy or a different Groq endpoint.
